---
title: "GitHub reproducible workbook"
author: "YU-LIN CHUNG, 35480351"
format:
    html:
        toc: true
        theme: solar
    pdf:
        toc: true
---

## INTRODUCTION
This is an example .qmd for my assignment2.

### Changes of the main branch
Change made on the main branch to create a conflict with testbranch.
